goal: reduce evaluator friction from interest to first real run, with Codeberg as the primary repo destination
why_this_action: Shared findings show the current bottleneck is conversion from interest to primary-repo action, while recent distribution work is already in measurement windows or blocked on external auth. The highest-leverage action available locally was to fix the repo-first evaluation path itself.
shared_findings_reused: ADOPTION_FUNNEL_NEXT.md: strongest next asset is a first-task / start-here guide
adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg adoption is flat and is the primary success gate
market_intelligence_latest.json: preserve Codeberg-first positioning and the four core truths
reddit_post_analysis.json: external comment cadence is currently a weaker lane than a cleaner owned conversion path
changes: created canonical START_HERE.md as the primary first-run guide
updated README quick links and first-click path to point to START_HERE.md
converted START_HERE_RALPHWORKFLOW.md into a thin redirect to reduce top-level duplication

docs_review_note.what_changed: Canonicalized the first-run path around START_HERE.md and removed duplicate top-level guidance from the old START_HERE_RALPHWORKFLOW.md file.
docs_review_note.why_this_surface: README and START_HERE are the evaluator path closest to repo conversion; this was a docs-surface fix, not a new distribution channel.
docs_review_note.what_was_pruned: Top-level duplication was reduced by replacing the full old START_HERE_RALPHWORKFLOW.md body with a thin redirect and by standardizing README to one canonical start-here target.
docs_review_note.why_top_level_is_better: A new visitor now has one obvious first click, one canonical first-run guide, and a cleaner Codeberg-first evaluation flow.

verification.link_check: README.md, START_HERE.md, and START_HERE_RALPHWORKFLOW.md all resolved with zero broken local links

measurement_window.success_signal: future repo traffic or adoption deltas improve after evaluators land on a cleaner first-run path
measurement_window.kill_condition: If Codeberg stars/watchers/forks remain flat after other current distribution windows resolve, replace this with a stronger repo proof asset or another conversion-surface repair rather than rewording the same guide again
